name_en: !!️《With Complete Original Green Box Packaging》!!️ GG Detail Wallet. Gucci leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personal way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with green GG accessories to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and Ebony GG Supreme canvas, green leather trim, brass hardware with green ceramic finish, GG detail cloud print fabric lining. Inside: card slot, coin pocket, 1 bill compartment. Model: 768244. Closed dimensions: 11 (W) x 9cm (H). Open dimensions: 21 (W) x 9cm (H). Color: Brown/Brown PVC. Italian creation. Weight: approx. 0.045 kg
